text: Stepping into this space, I am instantly aware of the blend between functionality and creativity. The clean, modern lines of glass and metal make me feel vigilant and slightly curious—each element seems carefully planned for both safety and inspiration. As I move closer to the R+D exhibit wall, I sense excitement and anticipation, stirred by the vibrant display and thoughtful arrangement. Here, ideas manifest as tangible, interactive forms. I feel intellectually stimulated, as if I am both spectator and participant in the ongoing dance of research and development.
